title: Attuned
description: Enhanced visuals and immersive audio -- without adding new blocks or dimensions. Fully vanilla compatible
body:
# Attuned 🌳 > A performance-friendly, visually refined Minecraft experience — no extra blocks, no extra dimensions. Just a better-looking, better-sounding game that works on any vanilla server. (currently working on a 26.1 release) --- ## 🚀 Optimized Performance Carefully tuned performance mods and settings keep things running smoothly. If your machine can handle shaders, it can handle Attuned. > ⚠️ **Chunk generation** may cause brief stuttering. The worldgen mod runs at minimal settings by default — you can disable it or tweak it in the mod settings. Progress is visible in the F3 menu. > ⚠️ **Dont want shaders?** No problem. The pack is tuned to look great without them — some effects (Atmospherics Mod) even look *better* without shaders. --- ## 🗺️ Voxy Support Terrain now generates automatically with the Voxy worldgen mod. ![Voxy terrain preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fefc20944003753058429b56f7d472b1e1e76b1.png) --- ## ✨ Refreshing Visuals
--- ## 🛠️ Quality of Life **Move freely while your inventory is open**
**Stack items directly into chests**
> 💡 **Tip:** Press `Ctrl + Right Click` to favorite an item — favorited items are excluded from chest stacking. - 🔍 Better, cleaner F3 debug menu - 💬 Improved chat with more functionality - ⌨️ Searchable keybind menu - 📋 Richer item tooltips - 💡 Hand-held lights illuminate the area around you — even without shaders - 📅 Day counter with sound effects - ...and more --- ## 🎧 Sounds - **Blocks** — new sound effects for placing and breaking specific blocks - **UI** — fresh sounds for menus and interactions - **Caves** — realistic echoes for an immersive underground feel - **Biomes** — ambient noise unique to each environment - **Footsteps** — improved, more natural movement sounds --- ## 🌳 Under the Hood everything is natural. No extra blocks, no new dimensions — just a better-looking, better-sounding game. Works seamlessly on **vanilla servers**, so your friends don't need any mods to play with you. **No otters were harmed in the making of this modpack. 🦦** --- ### 💡 Inspired by - [Fresh & Smooth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fresh-smooth/) - [Better Adventures+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-adventures-plus) ---
